claim: VERIFIED: YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements JSON key drift repair with explicit EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON blocker for unrecoverable JSON. All evidence paths are accurate, code matches claims, and test coverage confirms both repair and failure paths work as specified.

evidence.summary: parseJsonCandidate implements four regex-based JSON repair patterns
evidence.why: Direct code verification confirms lines 333-336 contain exactly the four drift patterns claimed: line ranges, escaped backslashes, key spacing, trailing commas. Returns {parsed, repaired, error} tracking repair status.

evidence.summary: normalizeAgentResult fail-closed logic for invalid JSON
evidence.why: Lines 369-394 show explicit EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON handling: error code assignment at line 370, missing array population at lines 382-384, blocked result structure at lines 385-393 with recommendation=block, verdict=blocked, completed=false.

evidence.summary: Test simulates Claude JSON drift and asserts json_repaired tracking
evidence.why: Lines 509-523 inject exact drift patterns: line range 42-88, unescaped backslash, key spacing, wrapped in markdown fence. Line 527 asserts json_repaired===true confirming repair detection works.

evidence.summary: Test confirms invalid JSON fails closed with EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON
evidence.why: Agent returns 'not json' string. Lines 557-559 assert three conditions: status===blocked, error_code===EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON, and PRD readiness blocked by same code - confirming fail-closed behavior.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness propagates evidence agent blockers to PRD readiness
evidence.why: Lines 709-727 show agent result processing: iterates required roles, checks completion, calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues at line 721 which extracts error_code into final blocker list affecting prd_ready.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues extracts error_code into explicit blocker
evidence.why: Lines 489-494 show error_code blocker generation: extracts errorCode at line 488, pushes blocker with preserved code and role-based message at lines 490-494. This connects agent error codes to PRD readiness blockers.

evidence.summary: extractJsonObject fallback strategies ensure all recoverable JSON is captured
evidence.why: Lines 346-366 show three-strategy extraction: direct parse (349-350), fenced JSON (352-357), sliced object extraction (358-364). Accumulates errors from all attempts before returning failure.

risks: Complex JSON corruption beyond the four repair patterns could fail closed incorrectly
Markdown fence detection might miss JSON in non-standard fence formats

result.notes: All explorer evidence verified against actual code and tests. Implementation is comprehensive: four specific drift patterns with repair tracking, explicit EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON fail-closed handling, test coverage for both repair and invalid JSON paths, and PRD readiness integration confirmed via router evidence processing. No assumptions promoted to facts.
